name: Whole Wheat Flatbread - Chapati
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flours and salt in a large mixing bowl.
2. Mix in oil and water to form a stiff dough, adding more water if necessary.
3. Remove dough from bowl and knead on a lightly floured surface until smooth, about 5 minutes.
4. Return dough to bowl, cover with a towel and set aside in a warm place for one hour.
5. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and divide into 14 equal portions.
6. Roll each piece into a ball and cover with a damp towel.
7. Heat an ungreased griddle or large frying pan over medium heat.
8. Working with one ball of dough at a time, flatten it, then roll into a 6-inch circle, using only enough flour to keep dough from sticking.
9. When the griddle is hot, pick up dough, shake off excess flour and place it on a hot pan.
10. Cook until brown spots appear, about one minute. Flip dough over and cook on other side. (Chapati may puff up while cooking.)
11. Cover and place in a warm oven while cooking remaining chapatis.
